calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, Successor in Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine.
Debra Aloise, plaintiff's Student Loan Coordinator, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Barry W. Morris.
Default was entered against defendant on October 3, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearnce, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, Successor in Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine, and against the Defaulted Defendant Barry W. Morris as follows:

Damages/Principal - $21,255.90.
Prejudgment Interest - $19,497.92.
Attorney's Fees - $3,324.00.
Costs - $575.00.
Late Fees - $550.32, for a total judgment in the amount of $45,203.14.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
